principle: Surfaces are UI-only. All business logic, controllers, view-models, and state machines live in shared brains. A surface importing logic directly from another surface or defining its own business logic is an OWNERSHIP_VIOLATION that blocks closure.

app-client.type: Expo React Native — customer mobile app
app-client.role: Customer-facing mobile experience — browse stores, discover products, manage cart, place orders, track delivery
allowed_content: React Native screen components consuming controllers/hooks from shared brain
Props drilling from navigator to screen
Event handlers that call shared controller actions
forbidden_content: Direct API fetch or axios calls
Local design system or Tamagui direct imports
Financial mutations or financial state management
State management stores owned by the surface
Topic logic (must live in shared brain)
app-client.api_call_policy: All API calls must go through shared controller which uses the generated typed client. No direct fetch/axios in surface files.
app-client.state_policy: State is owned by the shared controller (via React hooks). Surface receives state via hook return values only.
app-client.financial_policy: No financial mutations. Read-only display of payment/settlement status references from WLT shared controller only.
app-client.route_exposure: Expo Router / React Navigation routes defined in apps/app-client/runtime/src/App.tsx. Service screens mounted as route components.
app-client.start_command: $env:EXPO_PUBLIC_DSH_API_BASE_URL='http://127.0.0.1:58080'; pnpm --dir apps/app-client/runtime exec expo start --dev-client --host localhost --port 18101 --android --clear

app-partner.type: Expo React Native — merchant/partner mobile app
app-partner.role: Partner-facing mobile — store readiness context, catalog management, order acceptance, onboarding status, settlement display
allowed_content: React Native screen components consuming controllers/hooks from shared brain
forbidden_content: Local design system or Tamagui direct imports
app-partner.api_call_policy: All API calls via shared controller using generated typed client.
app-partner.state_policy: State owned by shared controller. Surface consumes hook return values.
app-partner.financial_policy: No financial mutations. WLT settlement status display via wlt_shared_brain only.
current_dsh_slices: DSH-001 (FIX_REQUIRED — store-only readiness context lacks loading/error visual proof)
DSH-015 (RUNTIME_VERIFIED — partner activation status and readiness checklist)
app-partner.dsh_001_scope_note: DSH-001 in app-partner implements store-only readiness context. Catalog management, partner orders, finance are excluded.
app-partner.start_command: $env:EXPO_PUBLIC_DSH_API_BASE_URL='http://127.0.0.1:58080'; pnpm --dir apps/app-partner/runtime exec expo start --dev-client --host localhost --port 18102 --android --clear

app-captain.type: Expo React Native — delivery captain mobile app
app-captain.role: Captain-facing mobile — store pickup context, order assignment, delivery navigation, PoD submission
allowed_content: React Native screen components consuming controllers/hooks from shared brain
forbidden_content: Local design system or Tamagui direct imports
app-captain.api_call_policy: All API calls via shared controller using generated typed client.
app-captain.financial_policy: No financial mutations. No earnings/commission display until WLT-001 approved.
current_dsh_slices: DSH-001 (FIX_REQUIRED — store-only pickup context lacks loading/error visual proof)
app-captain.dsh_001_scope_note: DSH-001 in app-captain implements read-only store pickup context. Delivery lifecycle and earnings are excluded.

app-field.type: Expo React Native — field agent mobile app
app-field.role: Field agent — store onboarding, verification, readiness escalation, document upload, store visits
allowed_content: React Native screen components consuming controllers/hooks from shared brain
forbidden_content: Local design system or Tamagui direct imports
app-field.api_call_policy: All API calls via shared controller using generated typed client.
app-field.financial_policy: No financial access. Field surfaces have no WLT dependency.
current_dsh_slices: DSH-001 (FIX_REQUIRED — store-only verification context lacks loading/error visual proof)

control-panel.role: Operations + management web dashboard — admin, governance, monitoring, analytics across all DSH sections

sections.operations: OperationsRoomFrame, QueuePageFrame, DetailPageFrame — orders, dispatch, cart (DSH-004, DSH-006, DSH-007, DSH-009)
sections.catalogs: DataTablePageFrame, EditorPageFrame, ReviewPageFrame — product catalog governance (DSH-003)
sections.partners: QueuePageFrame, DetailPageFrame, ReviewPageFrame — stores admin (DSH-001), field readiness (DSH-008), partner orders (DSH-006)
sections.marketing: OverviewPageFrame, EditorPageFrame, MetricsPageFrame — home discovery admin (DSH-002: banners, promos, categories)
sections.support: QueuePageFrame, DetailPageFrame — support queue, case detail (DSH-009)

allowed_content: Next.js page components consuming controllers from DSH/WLT shared brains
forbidden_content: Tamagui imports (control-panel uses CSS/Next.js styling, NOT Tamagui)
Direct fetch or axios (use generated typed clients via shared controllers)
forbidden_imports: @bthwani/ui-kit (use CSS + CpPrimitives for control-panel — no Tamagui in Next.js)
control-panel.api_call_policy: All API calls via DSH/WLT shared controllers using generated typed clients. No direct fetch in page components.
control-panel.state_policy: State owned by shared controllers. Page components consume hook return values.
control-panel.financial_policy: Finance section is READ-ONLY. Only FinanceReadOnlyFrame archetype permitted in finance section. No financial mutations in any control-panel route.
control-panel.route_exposure: Next.js App Router in apps/control-panel/runtime/src/app/. Service screens mounted as page.tsx components under route segments.
current_dsh_slices: DSH-001 (FIX_REQUIRED — Store Network Governance lacks loading/empty visual proof)
DSH-015 (RUNTIME_VERIFIED — partner governance list, detail, documents, store linking)
control-panel.design_debt: BLOCKING under REAL_EXPERIENCE_CLOSURE_v2 until removed or explicitly resolved within DSH-001 scope

webapp.role: SCAFFOLD_ONLY — out of scope for current DSH slices
forbidden_content: DSH/WLT business logic — not in scope
forbidden_imports: All service paths — out of scope

website.role: SCAFFOLD_ONLY — out of scope for current DSH slices
forbidden_content: DSH/WLT business logic — not in scope
forbidden_imports: All service paths — out of scope

owns: Control panel archetype frames (OverviewPageFrame, DataTablePageFrame, QueuePageFrame, OperationsRoomFrame, DetailPageFrame, EditorPageFrame, ReviewPageFrame, MetricsPageFrame, SettingsPageFrame, FinanceReadOnlyFrame)

wlt_shared_brain_for_dsh.allowed_usage: DSH surfaces import from this path for read-only financial reference display. No mutations permitted.
wlt_shared_brain_for_dsh.forbidden_usage: DSH surfaces must NOT call WLT mutation endpoints. No financial write operations.
